name: app-showcase-card
purpose: nimiq.com 'THE APPS' marketing card: light-gray rounded card with gold hexagon app-icon chip, title, 2-line gray subtitle and a CSS-built device mock ('Payment successful' toast + amount) clipped at the card edge. .wide modifier puts icon+copy left and a dashboard window mock right.
notes: MARKETING component, screenshot-referenced (no upstream source): calibrated against references/screenshots/nimiq-com/home-card-component.png (standard 'Pay App' card) and home-desktop-full.png THE APPS section (wide 'Nimiq wallet' card). Sampled colors: card bg #EFEEF0, phone frame #D9D9D9 on #F8F8F8 screen, navy #1F2348, check green #21BCA5, 'Top up' light blue #0582CA, gold chip radial-gradient(at 100% 100%, #EC991C, #E9B213). Device mock is a neutral CSS placeholder per brief (no images): phone frame with hamburger + '230' counter pill, white 'Payment successful ✓' toast, '150,00 €' amount, NIM sub-line with sparkline glyph, blue 'Top up ›' link, and a gray placeholder transaction row cut off by the card's bottom edge. REAL device-mock screenshots are now vendored: references/assets/nimiq-com/prismic/Zt7oXRoQrfVKl2hA_NimiqPayPreview.webp (490x916 phone, standard card) and Zt7oXhoQrfVKl2hB_NimiqWalletPreview.webp (1734x1164 desktop, wide card) — the snippet carries documented commented-out blocks for an optional real-asset variant; CSS mock stays the default so the component remains self-contained. Self-contained px units (marketing pages don't use the legacy html{font-size:8px} framework); Mulish via Google Fonts. Static markup, no script.
